creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Tue Aug 20 19:46:35 2013
New Revision: 325071
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/325071

Log:
  mail/mailman: reset maintainership
  
  - Add port back to the pool
  
  PR:		ports/181428
  Submitted by:	Chris Petrik <c.petrik.sosa@gmail.com> (maitainer)

Modified:
  head/mail/mailman/Makefile

Modified: head/mail/mailman/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/mail/mailman/Makefile	Tue Aug 20 19:39:33 2013	(r325070)
+++ head/mail/mailman/Makefile	Tue Aug 20 19:46:35 2013	(r325071)
@@ -11,7 +11,7 @@ MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}
 EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tgz
 DIST_SUBDIR=	mailman
 
-MAINTAINER=	c.petrik.sosa@gmail.com
+MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Mailing list manager (MLM) with a user-friendly web front-end
 
 LICENSE=	GPLv2
